description: A derived root-cause cluster (deviation-triage) — the SUSTAINED signal that ONE constraint (constraint_defined_in + constraint_id) recurs across many entities/episodes, meaning the standard/plan (Soll) is likely wrong rather than a single bad shift. Authored to close the SSOT gap: the discrepancy-engine emits kgNodeLabel Pattern with a GROUPS edge per active member but no profile declared it (services/discrepancy-engine/src/snapshot.ts patternObject:330-351 + buildPatternSnapshot:365-403). Node identity = pattern_id = pat-<hash(defined_in|constraint_id)> (ids.ts patternId:183); re-publishing each recompute coalesces onto the same node. Every attribute below is copied verbatim from the Pattern projection (services/discrepancy-engine/src/patterns.ts Pattern:35-90); member_classes is deliberately NOT declared — the engine skips it as internal stub-label routing (snapshot.ts:346-347). Created by the central discrepancy-engine, never edge-sourced — therefore no delivery/scope/promotion wire-contract.

attributes.name: pattern_id
attributes.description: Stable node id pat-<hash(defined_in|constraint_id)> (ids.ts patternId:183)

attributes.name: constraint_id
attributes.description: The constraint this pattern clusters on (patterns.ts Pattern.constraint_id:37)

attributes.name: defined_in
attributes.description: profileId the clustered constraint is defined in (patterns.ts Pattern.defined_in:38)

attributes.name: mom_category
attributes.description: ISA-95 MOM category carried from the head member; nullable (patterns.ts Pattern.mom_category:39)

attributes.name: accountable_role
attributes.description: RACI role accountable for the cluster; nullable (patterns.ts Pattern.accountable_role:40)

attributes.name: severity
attributes.description: Max constraint severity across active members; nullable (patterns.ts Pattern.severity:41)

attributes.name: member_count
attributes.description: Count of active (open/escalated) episodes in this pattern (patterns.ts Pattern.member_count:42)

attributes.name: distinct_entities
attributes.description: Distinct orders/machines affected — the breadth discriminator (patterns.ts Pattern.distinct_entities:44)

attributes.name: total_occurrences
attributes.description: All-state episodes sharing the constraint — recurrence breadth (patterns.ts Pattern.total_occurrences:46)

attributes.name: rate_per_day
attributes.description: Occurrences per day over the observed window (patterns.ts Pattern.rate_per_day:48)

attributes.name: likely_cause
attributes.description: 'systematic' -> the standard/plan is likely wrong (data); 'sporadic' -> execution (patterns.ts Pattern.likely_cause:51)

attributes.name: hypothesis
attributes.description: Plain-language hypothesis + suggested action (charter review when systematic) (patterns.ts Pattern.hypothesis:53)

attributes.name: expected_impact
attributes.description: Summed expected business-impact exposure across members — the rank key (patterns.ts Pattern.expected_impact:55)

attributes.name: financial_at_risk
attributes.description: Summed REAL euro-at-risk (financial-tier members only) (patterns.ts Pattern.financial_at_risk:57)

attributes.name: tier
attributes.description: 'financial' when any member carries a real euro exposure, else 'proxy' (patterns.ts Pattern.tier:62; impact.ts ImpactTier:46)

attributes.name: sample_discrepancy_id
attributes.description: discrepancy_id of the head/sample member (patterns.ts Pattern.sample_discrepancy_id:63)

attributes.name: member_discrepancy_ids
attributes.description: Capped list of the active members' discrepancy_ids — mirrors the GROUPS edges (snapshot.ts patternObject:341-343; patterns.ts Pattern.member_discrepancy_ids:66)

attributes.name: daily_series
attributes.description: Per-day occurrence series [{day,count}] over the observed window; JSON-serialised by the snapshot builder (patterns.ts Pattern.daily_series:79)

attributes.name: ewma
attributes.description: EWMA of the per-day occurrence rate (patterns.ts Pattern.ewma:81)

attributes.name: sigma
attributes.description: Population sigma of the per-day occurrence counts (patterns.ts Pattern.sigma:83)

attributes.name: trend
attributes.description: 'rising' -> the daily rate is escalating; 'flat' otherwise; nullable when too few days to judge (patterns.ts Pattern.trend:85)

attributes.name: capability
attributes.description: Capability (Cp/Cpk) status object {status:'blocked', reason} — blocked on a missing rated-ceiling datum; JSON-serialised by the snapshot builder (patterns.ts Pattern.capability:89)

relationships.description: One edge per active member episode grouped by this pattern; members may be any concrete Discrepancy class (snapshot.ts patternObject:336, buildPatternSnapshot:375-391)
